scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace apps/api && npm run lint --workspace apps/web
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run test:e2e --workspace apps/api
